prestazioni: Engine: FA24F (2.4L DOHC 16-valve twin-scroll turbocharged flat-four) – Full billet aluminum short block reinforcement with Manley forged pistons (9.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from JE Pistons for 8,000 RPM reliability. Pair with a Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger (1.15 A/R turbine housing, 64mm compressor wheel) and a custom 4-inch titanium downpipe by Tomei for optimized exhaust flow.

Drivetrain: STI 6-speed manual transmission reinforced with a PPG close-ratio gearset (2.96, 2.08, 1.54, 1.23, 1.00, 0.84) and a Cusco 2-way limited-slip differential with 45% preload. Clutch system upgraded to a Tilton 7.25-inch twin-disc setup with ceramic-metallic friction materials for 800+ lb-ft torque capacity.

Suspension & Handling: Full Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilover kit (24-way adjustable damping, 30mm front/20mm rear ride height adjustment) paired with STI-specified pillow-ball upper mounts and Whiteline adjustable front/rear sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear). Brembo GT-R 6-piston front/4-piston rear brake kit with 380mm two-piece rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads for fade-resistant stopping power.
estetica: Aerodynamics: STI-developed 'S209' carbon fiber widebody kit (front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear diffuser) with integrated canards by Varis. Front splitter upgraded to a 9 Lives Racing 3-piece adjustable unit with 50mm overhang for increased downforce. Rear wing replaced with a custom APR Performance GTC-300 2D carbon fiber wing (30-inch chord, 6-inch height) on STI-spec mounts.

Exterior Styling: Full Rocket Bunny 'Pandem' lip kit (front bumper, side skirts, and rear bumper) with STI-specific carbon fiber side mirrors. Paint scheme in Subaru World Rally Team (SWRT) blue with matte black accents, applied via a 3M 2080 vinyl wrap for durability. OEM headlights replaced with Morimoto XB LED projectors and sequential turn signals by Diode Dynamics.

Interior: Full Recaro SRD-E fixed-back bucket seats (FIA 8862-2009 certified) with custom STI embroidery, paired with a Takata Drift III 4-point harness. Steering wheel swapped for a NRG Innovations 350mm suede wheel with quick-release hub. Roll cage by Cusco (8-point bolt-in, chromoly construction) with integrated fire suppression system by Lifeline.
